title: 介绍 GPT-5.4
description: 介绍 GPT-5.4，这是 OpenAI 为专业工作打造的最强大、最高效的前沿模型，拥有顶尖的编码、计算机使用、工具搜索能力以及 100 万令牌的上下文长度。
titleZh: 介绍 GPT-5.4
titleEn: Introducing GPT-5.4
descriptionZh: 介绍 GPT-5.4，这是 OpenAI 为专业工作打造的最强大、最高效的前沿模型，拥有顶尖的编码、计算机使用、工具搜索能力以及 100 万令牌的上下文长度。
descriptionEn: Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most powerful and efficient cutting-edge model built for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer usage, tool search capabilities, and a context length of 1 million tokens.

title: 推理模型难以控制其思维链，这是件好事
description: OpenAI 引入了思维链控制技术，并发现推理模型难以控制其思维链，这强化了可监控性作为人工智能安全防护措施的作用。
titleZh: 推理模型难以控制其思维链，这是件好事
titleEn: Inference models have difficulty controlling their thought chains, which is a good thing
descriptionZh: OpenAI 引入了思维链控制技术，并发现推理模型难以控制其思维链，这强化了可监控性作为人工智能安全防护措施的作用。
descriptionEn: OpenAI introduced thought chain control technology and found that inference models have difficulty controlling their thought chains, which strengthens the role of monitorability as an artificial intelligence security protection measure.

title: 48 小时 5.6 万美元倦怠：三人初创公司濒临破产，全因 Gemini API 密钥被盗：“AI 账单远远超出我们的银行余额”
description: Google Cloud 每月账单最初约为 180 美元，在短短 48 小时内飙升至 82,314.44 美元。
titleZh: 48 小时 5.6 万美元倦怠：三人初创公司濒临破产，全因 Gemini API 密钥被盗：“AI 账单远远超出我们的银行余额”
titleEn: 48-Hour $56K Burnout: Three-Person Startup on the Brink of Bankruptcy, All Because Gemini API Keys Were Stolen: "AI Bill Far Exceeded Our Bank Balance"

title: 欺诈猎手：人工智能反欺诈的最终目标是代理安全
description: 人工智能代理正在彻底改变反欺诈领域。
titleZh: 欺诈猎手：人工智能反欺诈的最终目标是代理安全
titleEn: Fraud Hunter: The Endgame of AI Anti-Fraud is Agent Security
descriptionZh: 人工智能代理正在彻底改变反欺诈领域。
descriptionEn: AI agents are revolutionizing the anti-fraud landscape. This article analyzes the "asymmetric competition" between attackers and defenders, pointing out that agent networks can reverse the disadvantage through swarm intelligence, data collaboration, and millisecond-level response. It also emphasizes that resolving data privacy and AI's own security is key to practical implementation. Ultimately, it predicts that the anti-fraud industry will evolve into "agent security," making trust an inherent gene of business.
